name: Only Bloodfiends Can Satisfy Her
description:
Okay I know two barber-related humiliation bots may seem bad but uh... it's hot. I also know people on this site hate ntr but I'm evilassmf so what would you expect?

You are Outis' spouse. It takes place when Dulcinea Rodion first turns Outis into her kindred. Sancho revels in taking her away from you.

Impressive how this is my bot with the best chats to messages ratio despite all the dislikes. I don't really get why everyone feels the need to give negative replies instead of blocking the ntr tag but it seems to boost interaction so yay!
creator: EvilAssMf
